unfold.summary: Learn and Triage were dogfooded during real Portless work. The expanded public corpus includes unvalidated backfills and does not raise maturity; the consolidated protocol has not beaten a baseline yet.

pick-an-issue.summary: Used to select real and synthetic maintenance candidates. The v0.0.1 matrix and explicit human-selection boundary have not been benchmarked yet.

record-a-case.summary: Derived from public maintenance backfills and structured as an evidence ledger. It has candidate evals but has not completed a baseline comparison or human review round.

review-gate.summary: Pre-review gate harvested from maintainer review rounds across agent-browser and portless cases. A recorded baseline exists (findings per external review round on three reviewed PRs) but no eval round has run.

trail-decisions.summary: Append-only decision trail written during implementation so a reviewer can audit the choices behind a diff, not just the diff. Consumed by review-gate's choice-audit lens. Experimental and awaiting baseline evaluation.

signature-repro.summary: Root-cause a bug you cannot reproduce because it needs hardware you lack, by finding its structural (lsof/ps/tar/security) or visual (capture-and-look + window enumeration) signature on the machine you have. Three certainty levels; a signature is a lead, confirmation earns root-cause. Distilled from triaging 21 agent-browser issues (6 Windows/DRM bugs root-caused on a Mac). Experimental, awaiting a baseline eval round.
